name: Acorn Squash Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each squash crosswise into 6 (1/4 inch thick) slices. Discard seeds and membrane.
2. Arrange the slices in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
3. Pour orange juice over the squash and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
4. In a small, non-aluminum saucepan, combine brown sugar, corn syrup, olive oil, and lemon rind.
5. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Brush the sugar mixture on the squash slices.
7. Bake uncovered for an additional 15 minutes or until tender, basting occasionally.
